tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes, and a slightly increased creatinine, which may indicate early renal impairment. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, urea, calcium, and CO₂, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and follow-up for glycemic control and renal function.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
